_note: `<!DOCTYPE html>` is a valid Svelte template node: upstream's parser admits `![a-zA-Z]+` element names and treats `!doctype` (any case) as void; svelte2tsx strips the element from the overlay entirely (htmlxtojsx_v2/index.ts). Our parser used to reject the `!` with a fatal malformed-open-tag error, which marked the whole file broken — one phantom svelte error and EVERY tsgo diagnostic suppressed. The deliberate TS2322 here proves the doctype no longer blacks out real diagnostics.
